description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a polymer frame and a metal slide, featuring a matte black finish. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a textured surface for enhanced handling and control, and it appears to have subtle finger grooves for comfort. The slide has a series of horizontal serrations at both the front and rear, aiding in slide manipulation, and is free of visible external markings or engravings. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for gloved fingers and featuring a slight undercut for improved grip. The barrel is of standard length, with a clean, unadorned muzzle and no visible threading or compensator. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, with a slight bevel for easier magazine changes and no visible extensions or embellishments.
description: A matte black, modern semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, serrated slide, and a flat, beveled magazine base. The design is sleek and functional, with no visible external markings.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the slide serrations, rear sight, and the textured backstrap of the grip.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the full profile, including the slide serrations, trigger guard, and ergonomic grip contouring.
description_view_2: The front view displays the muzzle opening, front sight, and the width of the slide and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the slide serrations, ejection port, and the detailed grip texture.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and subtle finger grooves, providing a secure and comfortable hold. Its surface is covered in a fine, stippled texture for enhanced traction, and the backstrap features additional texturing for improved control. The material appears to be matte black polymer, and there are no visible logos or embellishments, giving it a clean, utilitarian look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a slight undercut at the rear to allow for a higher grip on the frame. It is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and has a smooth, untextured finish. The design is functional and robust, with no squared-off edges or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length and profile, with a smooth, unthreaded muzzle and no visible compensator or porting. The exterior is finished in matte black, matching the slide, and there are no visible markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unadorned, with only the functional serrations present at the front and rear.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, featuring a slight bevel for easier insertion and removal. There are no finger rests, extensions, logos, or texturing visible, giving it a streamlined and minimalist appearance.
